values.title: Gigabit Internet
values.description: Enterprise-grade fiber internet with dedicated bandwidth and backup connectivity.

values.title: Craft Coffee Bar
values.description: Complimentary specialty coffee, teas, and cold brew on tap throughout the day.

values.title: Vibrant Community
values.description: 600+ members from startups, freelancers, and remote teams creating together.

values.title: Events & Workshops
values.description: Weekly networking events, skill-sharing workshops, and founder talks.

values.title: 24/7 Secure Access
values.description: Keycard access with 24/7 security monitoring and on-site staff during business hours.

values.title: Full Office Services
values.description: High-speed printers, mail handling, phone booths, and meeting room booking.

values.title: The Hive Coworking
values.hero_description: Premium coworking spaces designed for productivity, collaboration, and community. Your office, reimagined.
values.cta_description: Tour our space and see why 600+ professionals call The Hive home. Free day pass available.

values.title: Flex Desk
values.body: Perfect for freelancers and remote workers who need flexible access. Grab any available hot desk in our open workspace.
values.includes:
• 10 days/month hot desk access
  • Gigabit WiFi
  • Coffee & tea included
  • 2 hours meeting room/month
  • Community events access

values.title: Dedicated Desk
values.body: Your own permanent desk in our open workspace. Leave your setup ready and come back to the same spot every day.
values.includes:
• Unlimited 24/7 access
  • Permanent desk with storage
  • Gigabit WiFi
  • 5 hours meeting room/month
  • Mail handling
  • Printing credits

values.title: Private Office
values.body: Lockable private offices for teams of 2-10. Fully furnished with standing desks, whiteboards, and soundproofing.
values.includes:
• Private lockable office
  • 24/7 access
  • Dedicated internet line
  • 10 hours meeting room/month
  • Company signage
  • Mail & package handling
  • Phone booth access

values.title: Meeting Rooms
values.body: Six fully equipped meeting rooms seating 4-20 people. Each room features 4K displays, video conferencing, whiteboards, and soundproofing. Book instantly via our app.

values.title: Kitchen & Lounge
values.body: Full kitchen with refrigerators, microwave, dishwasher, and complimentary snacks. The lounge area features comfortable seating, a pool table, and a library corner.

values.title: Podcast Studio
values.body: Professional-grade podcast and recording studio with acoustic treatment, quality microphones, mixers, and editing software. Available for booking by all members.

values.title: Wellness Room
values.body: A quiet space for meditation, nursing mothers, prayer, or simply taking a break. Equipped with comfortable seating, soft lighting, and sound machine.

values.title: Startup Pitch Night
values.body: Monthly event where member startups pitch to a panel of investors and mentors. Five-minute pitches followed by Q&A and networking over drinks.

values.title: AI Tools for Freelancers
values.body: Hands-on workshop exploring practical AI tools that save time and boost productivity. From writing assistants to design tools, learn what works and what's hype.

values.title: Friday Social Hour
values.body: Wind down the week with complimentary craft beer and snacks. Meet fellow members, share wins, and build connections in a relaxed atmosphere.

values.title: About The Hive
values.body:
The Hive Coworking opened in 2019 with a mission to create the ultimate workspace for independent professionals and growing teams.

Our Vision

We believe the future of work is flexible, collaborative, and human-centered. The Hive provides the infrastructure, community, and inspiration to do your best work.

The Space

20,000 sq ft across three floors in the heart of downtown. Natural light, biophilic design, and ergonomic furniture create an environment that energizes and focuses.

values.title: FAQ
values.body:
Can I try before I commit?

Yes! Book a free day pass to experience The Hive firsthand.

Is parking available?

We have a dedicated parking garage with monthly passes and daily rates.

Can I use the space on weekends?

Dedicated Desk and Private Office members have 24/7 access including weekends.

Do you offer virtual offices?

Yes, starting at $49/month for a business address, mail handling, and meeting room credits.
